name: codeagent-mobile-clients
description: CodeAgent Mobile clients — VS Code / Cursor / Windsurf extension, JetBrains plugin, and codeam-cli

scripts.build:vsc-plugin: cd apps/vsc-plugin && npm run build && npx @vscode/vsce package --no-dependencies
scripts.publish:vsc-plugin:cursor: cd apps/vsc-plugin && source .env && npx ovsx publish --no-dependencies --pat $OVSX_TOKEN
